subject: [PATCH v3 1/4] mm: bypass mmap_miss heuristic for VM_EXEC readahead

reviews.author: Jan Kara
reviews.summary: Raised a question about the impact of this change on other types of readahead, suggesting that it might be worth considering a more targeted approach to exclude only VM_EXEC readahead without affecting other types.

2026-04-02.patch_summary: The patch proposes to exclude VM_EXEC readahead from the mmap_miss heuristic in do_sync_mmap_readahead(). This is done by adding VM_EXEC to the list of excluded flags, similar to how VM_SEQ_READ is already excluded. The reasoning behind this change is that the exec readahead path is targeted and not speculative prefetch, so it should not be throttled by the mmap_miss heuristic.
